// purpose: A self-contained mini-project used as a generateTools fixture. The `@ext/*` path alias (baseUrl + paths) is the external-type-resolution win under test: a bare `@ext/types` import resolves ONLY because the generator picks up THIS tsconfig's compiler options. `include` deliberately matches ALL .ts here (tools.ts, ext, nested, and the 30 decoys) so the ballooning test can prove skipAddingFilesFromTsConfig keeps them out of the Project.
